sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n8423" key="a)nepiski/astos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀνεπι-σκίαστος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n8423.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">not in the shade,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0732.tlg008:19:15" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Alex.Aphr.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">in Mete.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">19.15</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
